particulars.description: The freehold property known as 17A whitefield road, tunbridge wells TN4 9UB registered at hm land registry with title number K925366.

17A whitefield road, turnbridge wells, kent t/no K925366 fixed charge all fixtures fittings plant and machinery which may from time to time be erected on or affixed to the property floating charge all other moveable plant machinery furniture equipment goods and other effects which are from time to time on the property.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge

particulars.description: 17A whitefield road tunbridge wells kent t/n K615894. By way of fixed charge the benefit of all covenants and rights concerning the property and plant machinery fixtures fittings furniture equipment implements and utensils the goodwill of any business carried on at the property and the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
